titleStmt.title: SII 41.133: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 133. (A.R. No. 132 of 1905.) Kaḷakkāḍu. Nāṅgunēri Taluk, Tirunelvēli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Gomati-Amman temple at Kaḷakkāḍu.

summary.p: The king gave permission to Iḷaiyāṉ Māttāṇḍakkuṭṭi to manage a maṭha called Vīra-māttāṇḍaṉ and look after the distribution of free meals [nīrākāram] there. Rāmaṉ Rāmaṉ wrote the document [Kollam] 708.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . Aruḷicceyal Eṉṟum Iḷaiāṉ māttāṇṭak kuṭṭi vEḷāvuṭaiāṉukku kaḷakkāṭṭu nayiṉār po
ycollāmeyyanayiṉār kōyilil pūcainaṭantu potum vakaiyil nācciāṟku kuṭuttuppōtum cōṟu kuṟuṇi
yum mēṟpaṭi Āḷaracarveḷkaiyil Eḻunūṟṟu Eṭṭām Āṇṭu cittirai mātam muppatān tiyati mutalukku nāṉ ke
ṭṭivitta viramāttāṇṭaṉ maṭattil nirākāram naṭantu potum vakaiku Ācantiratāravaṟ cantatippiṟa
vecam kallilum cempilum veṭṭi coṟu kuṟuṇiyum paṟṟi nirākāram naṭattip potumpaṭi Eḻunūṟṟu Eṭṭām
Āṇṭu cittiraimātam muppatān tiyati kaṟpitta Aḷavukku tāṉum Iṉṉāḷ mutal Ittaṟku piṭipāṭuāka Ivva
kaippaṭiyē coṟu kuṟuṇiyum paṟṟi ṉirākāram naṭattip potumpaṭiyum pāṟka Ippaṭikku Irāmaṉ Irāmaṉ
Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 41.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
